content:
OP.GG MCP scraper completed. Results:

- Ran for ~17 minutes (11:26 to 11:43)
- Processed all 159 champions
- Successfully fetched position data for 172 champions from OP.GG
- **227 errors** across all champions — every single build fetch failed with the same error: `'list' object has no attribute 'get'`

This error indicates the API response format has changed. The scraper expects dict objects (with `.get()` method) but is receiving lists instead. The position discovery step works fine, but the build detail fetching (runes, items, skill order, etc.) all fail due to this data structure mismatch.

- Output saved to: `F:\code-tengxun\static\champion_builds.json`
- The file likely contains champions with position info but no actual build data (runes, items, skills)

The scraper needs a code fix to handle the new API response format before it can successfully fetch build data.
